news.title: White House crypto czar David Sacks transfers to presidential advisory committee role
news.summary: White House AI and Crypto Czar David Sacks said Thursday he was joining the President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology and leaving the czar role.

news.title: Top Democrat on House committee questions Kraken's Federal Reserve account
news.summary: Maxine Waters, who would likely take the House Financial Services Committee gavel again if Democrats win the House, sent a letter to the Kansas City Fed.

news.title: Crypto edges off of worst levels after Trump extends Iran strike pause
news.summary: It was an ugly day all around in markets as the Iran war has sent oil prices and bond yields surging higher.
